classifier: TF-IDF char_wb(3,5) + word(1,3) + structural cues + LogisticRegression
reproducibility: Predictions are deterministic (fixed random_state + fixed training data + pinned sklearn). The joblib/numpy serialization is NOT byte-identical across rebuilds, so the artifact/evaluation_report sha256 below are integrity fingerprints of the committed build, not a byte-reproducibility guarantee. A rebuild yields the same predictions but a different file hash.

post_acceptance_fix.reason: Explicit alarm codes such as E47 were counted as product identifiers

v3_2_change.reason: Generalized the ad-hoc alarm-code / IP-rating masks into a single corpus-independent TECHNICAL_STANDARD negative layer (IP, USB, CAT, AES, radio-band families) plus a shared is_technical_token() helper, so model-shaped technical identifiers are never counted as products. Retrained on unchanged training data.

v3_3_change.reason: Telegraphic spec questions with power/location words (validation T1, A4) and post-installation confirmation phrasings (M4) tipped to troubleshooting: those words had only been seen in fault contexts. Added 16 targeted training examples (synthetic model names, no held-out overlap - the evaluator enforces it) and retrained.
